concerns: Google Workspace SAML setup is entirely manual (console-to-console) — cannot be automated via Pulumi
Google SCIM only syncs users, NOT groups — groups must be Pulumi-managed via aws.identitystore.Group
IAM Identity Center is region-locked once enabled — choose us-west-1 to match dev box region
SCIM access token is shown exactly once in AWS Console — must capture immediately
AWS Organization is a prerequisite — Identity Center requires organization instance for permission sets
Attaching instance profile to running EC2 may require stop/start if a different profile is already attached
Closing SSH port 22 in security group does NOT affect Tailscale SSH (different network layer)
packages/envoy/docs/constraints.md has hard rule: No more AWS changes from envoy work — new infra must be separate project
Pulumi runtime must be Node.js/ts-node, not Bun — follow packages/envoy/infra/tsconfig.json pattern
SCIM token expires after 1 year — renewal process should be documented in runbook
Cross-family review was skipped (Oracle timeout) — downstream planner should note this gap
